Package com.atlan.model.assets

Class DbtDimension

java.lang.Object
com.atlan.model.core.AtlanObject
com.atlan.model.relations.Reference
com.atlan.model.assets.Asset
com.atlan.model.assets.DbtDimension
All Implemented Interfaces:
IAsset, ICatalog, IDbt, IDbtDimension, IReferenceable, ISemantic, ISemanticDimension, AuditDetail, Serializable, Comparable<Reference>
@Generated("com.atlan.generators.ModelGeneratorV2") public class DbtDimension extends Asset implements IDbtDimension, ISemanticDimension, IDbt, ISemantic, ICatalog, IAsset, IReferenceable
Instance of a dbt semantic dimension in Atlan.

    getDbtAccountName()
    Name of the account in which this asset exists in dbt.
    String
    getDbtAlias()
    Alias of this asset in dbt.
    String
    getDbtConnectionContext()
    Connection context for this asset in dbt.
    String
    getDbtEnvironmentDbtVersion()
    Version of dbt used in the environment.
    String
    getDbtEnvironmentName()
    Name of the environment in which this asset exists in dbt.
    Long
    getDbtJobLastRun()
    Time (epoch) at which the job that materialized this asset in dbt last ran, in milliseconds.
    String
    getDbtJobName()
    Name of the job that materialized this asset in dbt.
    Long
    getDbtJobNextRun()
    Time (epoch) at which the job that materialized this asset in dbt will next run, in milliseconds.
    String
    getDbtJobNextRunHumanized()
    Human-readable time at which the job that materialized this asset in dbt will next run.
    List<DbtJobRun>
    getDbtJobRuns()
    List of latest dbt job runs across all environments.
    String
    getDbtJobSchedule()
    Schedule of the job that materialized this asset in dbt.
    String
    getDbtJobScheduleCronHumanized()
    Human-readable cron schedule of the job that materialized this asset in dbt.
    String
    getDbtJobStatus()
    Status of the job that materialized this asset in dbt.
    String
    getDbtMeta()
    Metadata for this asset in dbt, specifically everything under the 'meta' key in the dbt object.
    String
    getDbtPackageName()
    Name of the package in which this asset exists in dbt.
    String
    getDbtProjectName()
    Name of the project in which this asset exists in dbt.
    String
    getDbtSemanticFieldTimeGranularity()
    Time granularity for time dimensions only (day/week/month/quarter/year).
    String
    getDbtSemanticLayerProxyUrl()
    URL of the semantic layer proxy for this asset in dbt.

    getDbtSemanticModelQualifiedName()

    getDbtTags()

    • DbtDimension

  • Method Details

    • trimToReference

      public DbtDimension trimToReference() throws InvalidRequestException
      Builds the minimal object necessary to create a relationship to a DbtDimension, from a potentially more-complete DbtDimension object.
      Overrides:
      trimToReference in class Asset
      Returns:
      the minimal object necessary to relate to the DbtDimension
      Throws:
      InvalidRequestException - if any of the minimal set of required properties for a DbtDimension relationship are not found in the initial object

    • select

      public static FluentSearch.FluentSearchBuilder<?,?> select(AtlanClient client)
      Start a fluent search that will return all DbtDimension assets. Additional conditions can be chained onto the returned search before any asset retrieval is attempted, ensuring all conditions are pushed-down for optimal retrieval. Only active (non-archived) DbtDimension assets will be included.
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant from which to retrieve the assets
      Returns:
      a fluent search that includes all DbtDimension assets

    • select

      public static FluentSearch.FluentSearchBuilder<?,?> select(AtlanClient client, boolean includeArchived)
      Start a fluent search that will return all DbtDimension assets. Additional conditions can be chained onto the returned search before any asset retrieval is attempted, ensuring all conditions are pushed-down for optimal retrieval.
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant from which to retrieve the assets
      includeArchived - when true, archived (soft-deleted) DbtDimensions will be included
      Returns:
      a fluent search that includes all DbtDimension assets

    • refByGuid

      public static DbtDimension refByGuid(String guid)
      Reference to a DbtDimension by GUID. Use this to create a relationship to this DbtDimension, where the relationship should be replaced.
      Parameters:
      guid - the GUID of the DbtDimension to reference
      Returns:
      reference to a DbtDimension that can be used for defining a relationship to a DbtDimension

    • refByGuid

      public static DbtDimension refByGuid(String guid, Reference.SaveSemantic semantic)
      Reference to a DbtDimension by GUID. Use this to create a relationship to this DbtDimension, where you want to further control how that relationship should be updated (i.e. replaced, appended, or removed).
      Parameters:
      guid - the GUID of the DbtDimension to reference
      semantic - how to save this relationship (replace all with this, append it, or remove it)
      Returns:
      reference to a DbtDimension that can be used for defining a relationship to a DbtDimension

    • refByQualifiedName

      public static DbtDimension refByQualifiedName(String qualifiedName)
      Reference to a DbtDimension by qualifiedName. Use this to create a relationship to this DbtDimension, where the relationship should be replaced.
      Parameters:
      qualifiedName - the qualifiedName of the DbtDimension to reference
      Returns:
      reference to a DbtDimension that can be used for defining a relationship to a DbtDimension

    • refByQualifiedName

      public static DbtDimension refByQualifiedName(String qualifiedName, Reference.SaveSemantic semantic)
      Reference to a DbtDimension by qualifiedName. Use this to create a relationship to this DbtDimension, where you want to further control how that relationship should be updated (i.e. replaced, appended, or removed).
      Parameters:
      qualifiedName - the qualifiedName of the DbtDimension to reference
      semantic - how to save this relationship (replace all with this, append it, or remove it)
      Returns:
      reference to a DbtDimension that can be used for defining a relationship to a DbtDimension

    • get

      public static DbtDimension get(AtlanClient client, String id) throws AtlanException
      Retrieves a DbtDimension by one of its identifiers, complete with all of its relationships.
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant from which to retrieve the asset
      id - of the DbtDimension to retrieve, either its GUID or its full qualifiedName
      Returns:
      the requested full DbtDimension, complete with all of its relationships
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any error during the API invocation, such as the NotFoundException if the DbtDimension does not exist or the provided GUID is not a DbtDimension

    • get

      public static DbtDimension get(AtlanClient client, String id, boolean includeAllRelationships) throws AtlanException
      Retrieves a DbtDimension by one of its identifiers, optionally complete with all of its relationships.
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant from which to retrieve the asset
      id - of the DbtDimension to retrieve, either its GUID or its full qualifiedName
      includeAllRelationships - if true, all the asset's relationships will also be retrieved; if false, no relationships will be retrieved
      Returns:
      the requested full DbtDimension, optionally complete with all of its relationships
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any error during the API invocation, such as the NotFoundException if the DbtDimension does not exist or the provided GUID is not a DbtDimension

    • get

      public static DbtDimension get(AtlanClient client, String id, Collection<AtlanField> attributes) throws AtlanException
      Retrieves a DbtDimension by one of its identifiers, with only the requested attributes (and relationships).
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant from which to retrieve the asset
      id - of the DbtDimension to retrieve, either its GUID or its full qualifiedName
      attributes - to retrieve for the DbtDimension, including any relationships
      Returns:
      the requested DbtDimension, with only its minimal information and the requested attributes (and relationships)
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any error during the API invocation, such as the NotFoundException if the DbtDimension does not exist or the provided GUID is not a DbtDimension

    • get

      public static DbtDimension get(AtlanClient client, String id, Collection<AtlanField> attributes, Collection<AtlanField> attributesOnRelated) throws AtlanException
      Retrieves a DbtDimension by one of its identifiers, with only the requested attributes (and relationships).
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant from which to retrieve the asset
      id - of the DbtDimension to retrieve, either its GUID or its full qualifiedName
      attributes - to retrieve for the DbtDimension, including any relationships
      attributesOnRelated - to retrieve on each relationship retrieved for the DbtDimension
      Returns:
      the requested DbtDimension, with only its minimal information and the requested attributes (and relationships)
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any error during the API invocation, such as the NotFoundException if the DbtDimension does not exist or the provided GUID is not a DbtDimension

    • restore

      public static boolean restore(AtlanClient client, String qualifiedName) throws AtlanException
      Restore the archived (soft-deleted) DbtDimension to active.
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant on which to restore the asset
      qualifiedName - for the DbtDimension
      Returns:
      true if the DbtDimension is now active, and false otherwise
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any API problems

    • updater

      public static DbtDimension.DbtDimensionBuilder<?,?> updater(String qualifiedName, String name)
      Builds the minimal object necessary to update a DbtDimension.
      Parameters:
      qualifiedName - of the DbtDimension
      name - of the DbtDimension
      Returns:
      the minimal request necessary to update the DbtDimension, as a builder

    • trimToRequired

      public DbtDimension.DbtDimensionBuilder<?,?> trimToRequired() throws InvalidRequestException
      Builds the minimal object necessary to apply an update to a DbtDimension, from a potentially more-complete DbtDimension object.
      Overrides:
      trimToRequired in class Asset
      Returns:
      the minimal object necessary to update the DbtDimension, as a builder
      Throws:
      InvalidRequestException - if any of the minimal set of required fields for a DbtDimension are not present in the initial object

    • removeDescription

      public static DbtDimension removeDescription(AtlanClient client, String qualifiedName, String name) throws AtlanException
      Remove the system description from a DbtDimension.
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant on which to remove the asset's description
      qualifiedName - of the DbtDimension
      name - of the DbtDimension
      Returns:
      the updated DbtDimension, or null if the removal failed
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any API problems

      public static DbtDimension removeUserDescription(AtlanClient client, String qualifiedName, String name) throws AtlanException

      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant on which to remove the asset's description
      qualifiedName - of the DbtDimension
      name - of the DbtDimension
      Returns:
      the updated DbtDimension, or null if the removal failed
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any API problems

    • removeOwners

      public static DbtDimension removeOwners(AtlanClient client, String qualifiedName, String name) throws AtlanException
      Remove the owners from a DbtDimension.
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant from which to remove the DbtDimension's owners
      qualifiedName - of the DbtDimension
      name - of the DbtDimension
      Returns:
      the updated DbtDimension, or null if the removal failed
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any API problems

    • updateCertificate

      public static DbtDimension updateCertificate(AtlanClient client, String qualifiedName, CertificateStatus certificate, String message) throws AtlanException
      Update the certificate on a DbtDimension.
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant on which to update the DbtDimension's certificate
      qualifiedName - of the DbtDimension
      certificate - to use
      message - (optional) message, or null if no message
      Returns:
      the updated DbtDimension, or null if the update failed
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any API problems

    • removeCertificate

      public static DbtDimension removeCertificate(AtlanClient client, String qualifiedName, String name) throws AtlanException
      Remove the certificate from a DbtDimension.
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant from which to remove the DbtDimension's certificate
      qualifiedName - of the DbtDimension
      name - of the DbtDimension
      Returns:
      the updated DbtDimension, or null if the removal failed
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any API problems

    • updateAnnouncement

      public static DbtDimension updateAnnouncement(AtlanClient client, String qualifiedName, AtlanAnnouncementType type, String title, String message) throws AtlanException
      Update the announcement on a DbtDimension.
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant on which to update the DbtDimension's announcement
      qualifiedName - of the DbtDimension
      type - type of announcement to set
      title - (optional) title of the announcement to set (or null for no title)
      message - (optional) message of the announcement to set (or null for no message)
      Returns:
      the result of the update, or null if the update failed
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any API problems

    • removeAnnouncement

      public static DbtDimension removeAnnouncement(AtlanClient client, String qualifiedName, String name) throws AtlanException
      Remove the announcement from a DbtDimension.
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan client from which to remove the DbtDimension's announcement
      qualifiedName - of the DbtDimension
      name - of the DbtDimension
      Returns:
      the updated DbtDimension, or null if the removal failed
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any API problems

    • replaceTerms

      public static DbtDimension replaceTerms(AtlanClient client, String qualifiedName, String name, List<IGlossaryTerm> terms) throws AtlanException
      Replace the terms linked to the DbtDimension.
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant on which to replace the DbtDimension's assigned terms
      qualifiedName - for the DbtDimension
      name - human-readable name of the DbtDimension
      terms - the list of terms to replace on the DbtDimension, or null to remove all terms from the DbtDimension
      Returns:
      the DbtDimension that was updated (note that it will NOT contain details of the replaced terms)
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any API problems

    • appendTerms

      @Deprecated public static DbtDimension appendTerms(AtlanClient client, String qualifiedName, List<IGlossaryTerm> terms) throws AtlanException
      Deprecated.
      see Asset.AssetBuilder.appendAssignedTerm(GlossaryTerm)
      Link additional terms to the DbtDimension, without replacing existing terms linked to the DbtDimension. Note: this operation must make two API calls — one to retrieve the DbtDimension's existing terms, and a second to append the new terms.
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant on which to append terms to the DbtDimension
      qualifiedName - for the DbtDimension
      terms - the list of terms to append to the DbtDimension
      Returns:
      the DbtDimension that was updated (note that it will NOT contain details of the appended terms)
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any API problems

    • removeTerms

      @Deprecated public static DbtDimension removeTerms(AtlanClient client, String qualifiedName, List<IGlossaryTerm> terms) throws AtlanException
      Deprecated.
      see Asset.AssetBuilder.removeAssignedTerm(GlossaryTerm)
      Remove terms from a DbtDimension, without replacing all existing terms linked to the DbtDimension. Note: this operation must make two API calls — one to retrieve the DbtDimension's existing terms, and a second to remove the provided terms.
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant from which to remove terms from the DbtDimension
      qualifiedName - for the DbtDimension
      terms - the list of terms to remove from the DbtDimension, which must be referenced by GUID
      Returns:
      the DbtDimension that was updated (note that it will NOT contain details of the resulting terms)
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any API problems

    • appendAtlanTags

      @Deprecated public static DbtDimension appendAtlanTags(AtlanClient client, String qualifiedName, List<String> atlanTagNames) throws AtlanException
      Deprecated.
      see Asset.AssetBuilder.appendAtlanTags(List)
      Add Atlan tags to a DbtDimension, without replacing existing Atlan tags linked to the DbtDimension. Note: this operation must make two API calls — one to retrieve the DbtDimension's existing Atlan tags, and a second to append the new Atlan tags.
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant on which to append Atlan tags to the DbtDimension
      qualifiedName - of the DbtDimension
      atlanTagNames - human-readable names of the Atlan tags to add
      Returns:
      the updated DbtDimension
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any API problems

    • appendAtlanTags

      @Deprecated public static DbtDimension appendAtlanTags(AtlanClient client, String qualifiedName, List<String> atlanTagNames, boolean propagate, boolean removePropagationsOnDelete, boolean restrictLineagePropagation) throws AtlanException
      Deprecated.
      see Asset.AssetBuilder.appendAtlanTags(List, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean)
      Add Atlan tags to a DbtDimension, without replacing existing Atlan tags linked to the DbtDimension. Note: this operation must make two API calls — one to retrieve the DbtDimension's existing Atlan tags, and a second to append the new Atlan tags.
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant on which to append Atlan tags to the DbtDimension
      qualifiedName - of the DbtDimension
      atlanTagNames - human-readable names of the Atlan tags to add
      propagate - whether to propagate the Atlan tag (true) or not (false)
      removePropagationsOnDelete - whether to remove the propagated Atlan tags when the Atlan tag is removed from this asset (true) or not (false)
      restrictLineagePropagation - whether to avoid propagating through lineage (true) or do propagate through lineage (false)
      Returns:
      the updated DbtDimension
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any API problems

    • removeAtlanTag

      @Deprecated public static void removeAtlanTag(AtlanClient client, String qualifiedName, String atlanTagName) throws AtlanException
      Deprecated.
      see Asset.AssetBuilder.removeAtlanTag(String)
      Remove an Atlan tag from a DbtDimension.
      Parameters:
      client - connectivity to the Atlan tenant from which to remove an Atlan tag from a DbtDimension
      qualifiedName - of the DbtDimension
      atlanTagName - human-readable name of the Atlan tag to remove
      Throws:
      AtlanException - on any API problems, or if the Atlan tag does not exist on the DbtDimension
